name: Price City Tennis Courts
description: Price City Tennis Courts is a place to play pickleball in Price, UT. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Taft Ellsworth Memorial Pickleball Courts
description: Taft Ellsworth Memorial Pickleball Courts is a place to play pickleball in Price, UT. There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are free.
